title: Inpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Inpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LIFEWAYS INC PREVENTION AND RECOVERY TREATMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides inpatient and outpatient substance use disorder treatment services, including assessment and individual and group treatment/education. If needed, services are coordinated with the local court system, SAFE Court, and Community Corrections to fulfill legal obligations. Other services include domestic violence intervention services, moral reconation groups, anger management, dual diagnosis treatment, and urinalysis and other screening tools. Substance use disorder prevention education available for children, parents, and community members. Also provides gambling assessment and treatment. 702 Sunset Drive Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Assessment walk-in hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-3pm Office: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm, evening services available Email (541) 889-9167 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPTIONS FOR SOUTHERN OREGON INC CRISIS RESOLUTION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a co-occurring (mental health and addictions) treatment facility, specializing in providing secure psychiatric and addictions stabilization and respite services. 320 SW Ramsey Avenue Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Adults determined to have a chronic mental illness who are experiencing a psychiatric emergency and who may have co-occurring disorders Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 476-2373 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIFEWAYS INC PREVENTION AND RECOVERY TREATMENT SERVICES OPTIONS FOR SOUTHERN OREGON INC CRISIS RESOLUTION CENTER
